title: Rebuild of Evangelion 222 DVD Blu Ray Promo 101
display_title: Rebuild of Evangelion 222 DVD Blu Ray Promo 101
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion 2.22 DVD/Blu-Ray Promo 1.01             Quote Post by jacksterson » Sun Apr 18, 2010 6:48 pm Phew, quite a long title. Anyways, thanks Evageeks, for providing the source video, I've had the OST for 2.0 for quite awhile and I listen to it pretty much every day (not JUST that, but its part of my shuffle :P). I saw this video and I just thought "God, the audio is TERRIBLE. Something must be done about this!" And so, ye behold, I did. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ChUmVrDtJik *EDIT* Ah what the hell, youtube butchered both the audio and video quality... *EDIT 2* Oh wait, its still processing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 18, 2010 7:38 pm The version of Tsubasa o Kudasai is meant to be a new version by Hayashibara (though yeah it's really stretched out <____> ) but I like what you did with this. The silence near the end was fitting.

[]:             Quote Post by jacksterson » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:00 pm Thanks! While editing I did notice the song ended a bit sooner than the actual teaser, I thought it was because I encoded in NTSC, so I re-encoded in PAL. Anyways, nice to know I wasn't losing my competence, lawl. Btw, I'm new to the forums, hope to stick around. (:

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:03 pm Oh.I was wondering what the hell you did and I found out you made the song end sooner then before.Well,I guess you did a nice job.

[]:             Quote Post by jacksterson » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:57 pm Um, no, thats not what I did (at least intentionally). The music in the official trailer is very dull and hardly pronounced. I replaced the audio with the song from the actual OST to make it more profound.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Apr 19, 2010 11:58 am i cant stand the singing :( i love the music though

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 19, 2010 12:02 pm EvaCub wrote: i cant stand the singing :(

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Apr 19, 2010 3:20 pm Reichu wrote: Well, Hayashibara is singing out of her natural vocal range. That must have hurt like a bitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 19, 2010 3:25 pm NAveryW wrote: There's no need for her to do something painful. Every recording studio in existence uses Autotune for pitch correction purposes.

[]:             Quote Post by jacksterson » Mon Apr 19, 2010 4:41 pm Seriously? I don't think I'll ever understand why people hate things. I've always been the one to love things and have people spit back saying it sucks. i.e "I love the matrix, all of them; rebuild is completely awesome; etc etc" I really don't see anything wrong with the singing, maybe the pitch is a bit loud and could be a little lower, but in all likeliness its probably the audio codec that has that 'hurting' feeling

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Apr 19, 2010 9:18 pm Hate/I can't stand was probably to strong ofwords. I dont like it is all. Preference maybe? I decided to replace the music with a the BSG All Along The Watchtower Arangement All Along The Watchtower 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 20, 2010 8:37 am EvaCub wrote: I decided to replace the music with a the BSG All Along The Watchtower Arangement All Along The Watchtower 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Apr 20, 2010 1:46 pm NAveryW wrote: I freaking called it!
